hooks.command: [ -f /tmp/swk-focuseditor-swift-pending ] || exit 0; rm -f /tmp/swk-focuseditor-swift-pending; cd /Users/bd/xcode-projects/schreibwerkstatt-focuseditor && if xcodebuild test -project schreibwerkstatt-focuseditor.xcodeproj -scheme schreibwerkstatt-focuseditor -destination 'platform=macOS' -quiet >/tmp/swk-focuseditor-test.log 2>&1; then echo '{"systemMessage":"\u2705 schreibwerkstatt-focuseditor: Tests gr\u00fcn"}'; else echo '{"systemMessage":"\u274c schreibwerkstatt-focuseditor: Tests/Build fehlgeschlagen \u2014 Log: /tmp/swk-focuseditor-test.log"}'; fi
